visual_description: A man in a suit and tie, wearing a headset, is seen in profile, looking toward another person partially visible on the right. Outside at night, several uniformed individuals stand near a parked car with headlights on, beside a rocky embankment. One person gestures with their arm extended toward the group.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice shouting with a high pitch and loud volume, followed by a gasp and a sigh.
